extraction.one_line_summary: MARINI Nicolas won stage 1 bunch sprint in wet conditions despite still searching for a 2018 contract
tactical_patterns: Neri Sottoli's Marini positioned by Alomar/Boni leadout despite team folding, suggesting intact motivation from contract-seeking riders.
Wet opening road stages create positioning chaos where everyone fights for sprint position simultaneously, eliminating organized trains.

rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: positive: Won bunch sprint while admitting not at top condition post-injury, contract desperation may unlock extra motivation
rider_signals.MORASKO Jakob: negative: Only third in expected sprint victory despite being pre-race favorite
rider_signals.BUFVIN: neutral: Held prologue lead through bonus seconds but not tested in GC terms yet
